title: Mythical Critters
description:
Mythical Critters adds mythical themed creatures in the vanilla style to serve as companions and add some whimsy to your world.
All Mythical Critters are tamable!
body: Mythical Critters adds mythical themed creatures in the vanllia style to serve as companions and add some whimsy to your world. All Mythical Critters are tamable! Mythical Critters is still adding more critters but all added creatures are complete, critters won't be added till they're polished, no half baked features in your world. Existing critters may get added functionality/tweaks later. There is currently only 1 critter (the main reason for being in beta) but many more are on the way! Shrooms can be found in Dark Oak Forests, Mushroom Islands, and rarely in Old Growth Tagias. They love Slimeballs and Glow Lichen and can be befriended by giving it to them. They don't breed but can grow another shroom if fed a slime block on Myclium or Podzol. When tamed they have a tendency to wonder off but always come running back when they notice they've gotten too far, they can also be told to sit and will root themself into the ground and wait.
